work_experience.title: Delivery Manager / Product Owner | SAFe Agile Transformation
work_experience.description: Leading SAFe Agile transformation and product delivery for a top global insurance broker's digital platform modernization. Driving end-to-end product ownership, PI Planning facilitation, and cross-functional team coordination across multiple time zones. Integrated Amazon Q Developer for AI-assisted code analysis achieving 30% improvement in release velocity. Spearheading migration of legacy trading platform to AWS-native microservices architecture using Terraform and Amazon ECS. Leading Angular 10→18 frontend migration with Material Design, improving UI performance by 40%. Facilitating PI Planning sessions, managing product backlog, coordinating UAT cycles. Built new cross-functional team achieving delivery velocity parity within first quarter. Mentored tech leads, increasing team capacity by 15% and reducing conflicts by 60%.

work_experience.title: Senior Technical Program Manager & Product Owner | Cash Equities
work_experience.description: Directed enterprise-scale technology programs for Deutsche Bank's Cash Equities division — trade information processing and regulatory reporting across 15 countries. Managed 200TB+ database with 25+ critical regulatory reporting requirements. Enhanced SDLC development process improving project delivery efficiency by 20%. Reduced program costs by 50% through optimized architectural frameworks. Revamped release preparation workflows using Agile/ServiceNow — reduced to 15 minutes, increased deployment frequency by 30%. Re-engineered critical components cutting annual support costs by $1.2M. Led GCP cloud migration achieving 25% more system uptime. Directed DB-Fidessa M&A integration across 8 asset classes — 98% SIT success rate.

work_experience.title: Senior Technical Program Manager | Cash Equities
work_experience.description: Managed diverse Technical Program within International Banking Investment sector — Cash Equities. Led Performance Automation System for operational processes, global Clarion Project for client team integration, expansive IT infrastructure transformation (13,000+ SharePoint sites, 80+ applications to cloud), and comprehensive analytical engine for Credit Risks Analysis (CVA/CE) reducing computation time by 88%. Managed vendor consolidation (12 to 4 vendors) reducing overhead 40%. Reinforced bank's operational efficiency, technological resilience, and analytical acuity.

work_experience.title: Senior Project Manager | Corporate Portals, Procurement
work_experience.description: Delivered comprehensive corporate portal for Lukoil using SharePoint/C# within microservices architecture — unified access across global branches (25,000+ users, 12 countries). Spearheaded PepsiCo 'MyBay' procurement system integrating Ariba with SAP for 15 markets. Guided delivery of customized lot management solution for Brookfield ($1.5M budget) on .NET platform. Established and led agile development of Pfizer's corporate portal services including Corporate Chat, News, and Business Workflow.

work_experience.title: Project Manager & Analyst | Cloud SaaS, e-Gov
work_experience.description: Successfully launched Pre-Production phase of 'Virtual Office - SaaS' in Electronic Government Program. Modernized front and back-office processes to deliver value and accelerate business performance. Adopted cloud-enabled service model — helped launch new cloud services. Delivered Cloud Storage Management Portal. Simplified supplier access to services meeting customers' business needs.

work_experience.title: Portfolio/Project Manager | IT PM, EPM

Developed web-portal based on MS SharePoint Services.
